title: Rapt0r's Shinies
body:
Texture pack of custom shinies for the Cobblemon mod. 

**Currently included Pokémon:**
- Armarouge
- Ceruledge

**To be added:**
- Charcadet
- Ghastly, Haunter & Gengar
- Mankey, Primeape & Annihalape
- Tinkatink, Tinkatuff & Tinkaton
- Gimmighoul & Gholdengo
- Munchlax & Snorlax
- Swinub, Piloswine & Mamoswine
- Farfetch'd, Galarian Farfetch'd & Sirfetch'd
- Gible, Gabite & Garchomp
- Vaporeon, Flareon, Jolteon, Espeon, Umbreon, Leafeon & Glaceon
- Vulpix, Ninetales, Alolan Vulpix, Alolan Ninetales
- Scyther, Scizor & Kleavor
- Magby, Magmar & Magmortar
- Elekid, Electabuzz & Electivire
- Bulbasaur, Ivysaur & Venusaur
- Squirtle, Warortle & Blastoise
- Charmander & CHarmeleon
- Nidoqueen
- Pichu, Pikachu, Raichu, Alolan Pichu, Alolan Pikachu & Alolan Raichu
- Dragonite
- Riolu & Lucario
- Hisuian Goomy, Hisuian Sliggoo & Hisuian Goodra
